response.overview: The film’s main character, Nini (26), comes from a family that is deeply invested in arranging a financially advantageous marriage for her. For this reason, her aunt and other family members set her up with Gigi, a 30-year-old businessman. At first, Gigi seems like a desirable match to Nini. Their relationship continues until Nini, after finding herself in an awkward situation, accidentally meets Zaza, a 30-year-old painter who leads an unhealthy lifestyle and struggles with drug addiction.  Nini is then faced with a choice: she must choose between love and security/prosperity.
response.title: Margin
